findings.message: Vague quantifier "some" in instructional prose; the following sentences (tangents, asides, half-formed thoughts) partially resolve the ambiguity.

Vague quantifier "some" in instructional prose; the following sentences (tangents, asides, half-formed thoughts) partially resolve the ambiguity. — Instructional line reads: "Let some mess in." — "some" is a vague quantifier; immediately followed by three concrete examples that narrow the meaning.
